title: Epic Enchants (v1.2.2)
description: Adds many new and useful enchantments to Minecraft!
body:
![Epic Enchants Animated Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2dbd0e5ebff6236f60eb7cb1b79c5cd1f9fe578c.gif)

## This mod adds useful enchatments to the game. Right now, there are nine, but there will be more added in the future with regular updates:

### Wall Climb
This enchant can be applied to any boots, and **it allows the player to climb walls by walking up to them and crouching.**

### Bane of Totems
This enchant can be applied to any sword that does not have Sharpness. **When an entity or player is hit with this sword, they will drop their Totem of Undying on the ground, allowing you to steal it!**

### Bludgeon
This enchantment has 4 levels, and can be applied to any sword that does not have Sharpness. **When a player or entity is hit with this sword, there is a chance that they will get Blindness and Slowness for 4 seconds.** The odds of the effects being applied increases with the enchantment level, starting at 1/25 at level 1, and going to 1/5 at level 4.

### Lifesteal
**This enchantment heals the player when they deal damage the enchanted sword**, and the amount that is healed scales with the level, where the level equals the health gained. Level 1 heals 1 health (or half a heart) per hit, and level 5 heals 5 health (or two and a half hearts) per hit.

### Cat Eyes
This enchantment only has one level, **and can be applied on helmets to get infinite night vision.**

### Jagged
This enchantment can be added to any sword without Sharpness, **as this enchantment will give the user Sharpness on their sword for a short while after hitting an enemy at the cost of a bit of health.**

### Explosive
This enchantment applies to pickaxes, and has three levels. **Each level raises the chances for there to be an explosion when mining a block with the enchanted pickaxe, going from 1/30 at level 1, up to 1/10 at level 3.** This enchantment is good for mining out large areas!

### Bouncy
This enchantment can be applied to any boots, **and it gives the wearer permanent Jump Boost II.**

### Feather Landing
This enchantment can be applied to any boots, **and it negates all fall damage for the wearer.**

### Mjolnir
This enchantment can be applied to any type of sword or axe, **and it will have a chance to strike the opponent with lightning**, with the odds going from 1/20 for level I to 1/5 for level III
